title: Air Fried Crunchy Canadian Potato Wraps
description: Spicy and crunchy Canadian dish featuring dill pickles, made air-fry with a touch of sweetness for a cozy meal that's also diabetic-friendly.

ingredients.name: Spices and Seasonings (e.g. Paprika, Garlic Powder, Cumin, Salt, Pepper)

instructions: Peel and slice the potatoes into rounds about 1/4 inch thick.
Slice the dill pickles thinly for layering on top of potato slices.
Mix together a few drops of sweetener (if using) with spices to taste, then brush evenly over both sides of sliced potatoes.
Place the seasoned potato slices and dill pickle slices in a single layer inside an air fryer basket. Ensure they are spread out for even cooking.
Air-fry at 375°F for about 10 minutes until golden brown and crispy on one side, then flip over and air-fry for another 5-8 minutes or until desired crispiness is achieved.
Serve warm as a snack or meal accompaniment.
